text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
STANDALONE — no Cell base class.
draw() uses simulationConfig.cell_color (1.0),
NOT per-cell _brightness.
_brightness stored but unused.
Src: src/Spheroid.cpp (~658 lines)

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
L2 cost (NORM_L2) + overlap penalty.
_currentCost cached to avoid redundant L2.
perturbCell uses computeOverlapForCell (O(n)).
trySplitCell burn-in uses overlap penalty.
Src: src/Frame.cpp (~423 lines)

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
Unified stochastic loop in optimize().
P(split) from PREVIOUS frame PCA elongation.
Pre-opt shapes saved for trySplitCell.
Split blacklist prevents redundant burn-ins.
previousElongations stored end-of-frame.
Src: src/CellUniverse.cpp (~498 lines)

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: cell is unique_ptr~SpheroidConfig~.\nRule of Five: copy ctor deep-copies,\nmove ctor/assign = default.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
Preprocessing pipeline:
1. BGR→Gray, normalize [0,1]
2. Gaussian blur (sigma=10)
3. Auto-calibrate sigmoid center from bg zone
4. Sigmoid: 1/(1+exp(-75*(x-center)))
5. Z-interpolation (33→225 slices)
